category_sources: Official GitHub README describes mask as a CLI task runner defined by a simple Markdown file; source_facts.description matches.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is mask; official GitHub repository is jacobdeichert/mask and README uses mask.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains installation, getting started, features, arguments, flags, subcommands, runtimes, and help output documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/jacobdeichert/mask, so repo is intentionally returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README describes Markdown-defined commands, scripts, flags, subcommands, multiple scripting runtimes, and CLI usage; source_facts.executables lists mask.
